title: Biome'd Creepers
description: An EMF resource pack that gives creepers a new look, unique to many biomes! Supports Fresh Animations!
body:
Revamps creeper textures and adds unique models and textures to select biomes.

Requires [Entity Model Features mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [Entity Texture Features mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home).

Has support for [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) (download the FA+BiomedCreepers zip instead of regular zip and make sure it is above Fresh Animations in the resource pack selector)

Screenshots in gallery.
